text:
Weekly Shōnen Jump, abbreviated as WSJ, releases merchandise that is sold on officially licensed stores of Shueisha, such as JUMP SHOP and Jump Characters Store. WSJ merchandise is tagged with 週刊少年ジャンプ and is sold in random sets of popular WSJ works, including Hunter × Hunter. Collections such as the Art Card Collection (アートカードコレクション) and Status Card Collection (ステータスカードコレクション) consist only of designs of a specific WSJ work. These collections are usually sold in full sets on Jump Characters Store and only in random singles on JUMP SHOP, or vise-versa. If one site sells a collection in a full set, the site may also sell them in random singles at a later date.

Exclusive/Limited Merchandise

Merchandise that is exclusive to JUMP SHOP or Jump Characters Store can be found on their respective pages:
JUMP SHOP
Jump Characters Store

WSJ Merchandise that has been sold on both sites, in full sets or in random sets, can be found on this page.
